_Comment_Configuration: Single-file config. Environment-specific overrides live in 'Environments:{env}' below, automatically applied at startup by Program.cs based on the Blazor environment (Development | Production). In development the DevServer sends 'blazor-environment: Development'; on IIS static files the environment defaults to Production.

Environments._Comment: Dev: Blazor DevServer sends 'blazor-environment: Development'. Prod IIS: defaults to Production when no header is sent.
